title: Install plan for the 5 missing defaults
outcome: Install plan for the 5 missing defaults derived and verified by dry-run (no installs performed — agent rails). The 5 default formulae are: zsh-autosuggestions, zsh-syntax-highlighting, tealdeer (tldr), btop, dua-cli. A full `panoply bootstrap` additionally installs the optional brew-bearing missing tools (zsh-autocomplete, choose-rust, gitleaks); aube has no brew formula (detect-only). The plan is reproducible via `panoply gen brewfile --missing --defaults`; no redundant install doc was added (same lean, human-gated pattern as E01/E02 deferrals).

human_action_required.command_full: panoply bootstrap   (installs the 8 missing brew tools + wires the shell)
human_action_required.command_defaults_only: brew install zsh-autosuggestions zsh-syntax-highlighting tealdeer btop dua-cli
human_action_required.note: the two zsh plugins are path-detected under $HOMEBREW_PREFIX/share and are sourced by panoply.zsh / the chezmoi plugins layer once installed

validation: Agent portion PASS: `gen brewfile --missing --defaults` lists exactly the 5 defaults; `bootstrap --dry-run` confirms the same set (+optional extras) and performs no installs/config writes. DEFERRED (human): `panoply bootstrap` run -> `panoply doctor` reports 0 missing defaults. Cannot be completed by the agent (no_global_install rail).
decisions: S3 produces a reproducible, generator-derived install plan rather than a static doc; the manifest stays the source of truth
the 0-missing-defaults acceptance is a human step (install), recorded as DEFERRED — mirrors E01 chezmoi-apply and E02 sops-encryption deferrals
next: E03.S4 — RTK as recommended-default output compressor
deferred: human runs `panoply bootstrap` to install the 5 defaults; then `panoply doctor` must report 0 missing defaults
token_note: loaded 1 story block + STATE/ledger tail; plan is generator output (no install logs); no canon ref needed
